verses.en: In the beginning, our Heavenly Father created the heavens and the earth.
verses.tr: Nang pasimula, nilikha ng ating Amang nasa Langit ang langit at ang lupa.

verses.en: Now the earth was formless and empty, darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of our Father was hovering over the surface of the waters.
verses.tr: Ang lupa noon ay walang anyo at walang laman, dilim ang lumukob sa balat ng kalaliman, at ang Espiritu ng ating Ama ay kumikilos sa ibabaw ng tubig.

verses.en: Then our Father said, "Let there be light," and there was light.
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Magkaroon ng liwanag," at nagkaroon ng liwanag.

verses.en: He saw that the light was good, and he separated the light from the darkness.
verses.tr: Nakita niyang mabuti ang liwanag, at inihiwalay niya ang liwanag sa dilim.

verses.en: He called the light "day," and the darkness he called "night." And there was evening, and there was morning—the first day.
verses.tr: Tinawag niyang "araw" ang liwanag, at "gabi" naman ang dilim. Nagkaroon ng gabi, at nagkaroon ng umaga—ang unang araw.

verses.en: And our Father said, "Let there be an expanse between the waters to separate water from water."
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Magkaroon ng kalawakan sa pagitan ng mga tubig upang maghiwalay ang tubig sa tubig."

verses.en: So he made the expanse and separated the water under the expanse from the water above it. And it was so.
verses.tr: Kaya't ginawa niya ang kalawakan at inihiwalay ang tubig sa ilalim ng kalawakan mula sa tubig na nasa itaas nito. At nangyari nga.

verses.en: He called the expanse "sky." So there was evening, and there was morning—the second day.
verses.tr: Tinawag niyang "langit" ang kalawakan. Kaya't nagkaroon ng gabi, at nagkaroon ng umaga—ang ikalawang araw.

verses.en: Then our Father said, "Let the water under the sky be gathered to one place, and let dry ground appear." And it was so.
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Magsama-sama sa isang dako ang tubig sa silong ng langit, at lumitaw ang tuyong lupa." At nangyari nga.

verses.en: He called the dry ground "land," and the gathered waters he called "seas." And he saw that it was good.
verses.tr: Tinawag niyang "lupa" ang tuyong dako, at "mga dagat" naman ang sama-samang tubig. At nakita niyang mabuti ito.

verses.en: Then he said, "Let the land produce vegetation: seed-bearing plants and trees that bear seed-bearing fruit, each according to its kind." And it was so.
verses.tr: At sinabi niya, "Magsibol sa lupa ang mga halaman: mga pananim na may binhi at mga punongkahoy na namumunga ng bungang may binhi, ayon sa kani-kanilang uri." At nangyari nga.

verses.en: The land produced vegetation: seed-bearing plants according to their kinds and trees bearing seed-bearing fruit according to their kinds. And our Father saw that it was good.
verses.tr: Nagsibol sa lupa ang mga halaman: mga pananim na may binhi ayon sa kanilang uri at mga punongkahoy na namumunga ng bungang may binhi ayon sa kanilang uri. At nakita ng ating Ama na mabuti ito.

verses.en: And there was evening, and there was morning—the third day.
verses.tr: At nagkaroon ng gabi, at nagkaroon ng umaga—ang ikatlong araw.

verses.en: And our Father said, "Let there be lights in the expanse of the sky to separate the day from the night, and let them serve as signs to mark the seasons, the days, and the years,"
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Magkaroon ng mga tanglaw sa kalawakan ng langit upang ihiwalay ang araw sa gabi, at magsilbi silang mga tanda na magpapahiwatig ng mga panahon, ng mga araw, at ng mga taon,"

verses.en: "and let them be lights in the expanse of the sky to give light on the earth." And it was so.
verses.tr: "at maging mga tanglaw sila sa kalawakan ng langit upang magbigay-liwanag sa lupa." At nangyari nga.

verses.en: Our Father made two great lights: the greater light to govern the day and the lesser light to govern the night. He also made the stars.
verses.tr: Ginawa ng ating Ama ang dalawang malaking tanglaw: ang mas malaking tanglaw upang mamahala sa araw at ang mas maliit na tanglaw upang mamahala sa gabi. Ginawa rin niya ang mga bituin.

verses.en: He set them in the expanse of the sky to give light on the earth,
verses.tr: Inilagay niya ang mga ito sa kalawakan ng langit upang magbigay-liwanag sa lupa,

verses.en: to govern the day and the night, and to separate light from darkness. And he saw that it was good.
verses.tr: upang mamahala sa araw at sa gabi, at upang ihiwalay ang liwanag sa dilim. At nakita niyang mabuti ito.

verses.en: So there was evening, and there was morning—the fourth day.
verses.tr: Kaya't nagkaroon ng gabi, at nagkaroon ng umaga—ang ikaapat na araw.

verses.en: Then our Father said, "Let the water teem with living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the expanse of the sky."
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Mapuno ng mga buhay na nilalang ang tubig, at lumipad ang mga ibon sa ibabaw ng lupa sa kalawakan ng langit."

verses.en: So he created the great sea creatures and every living creature that moves and teems in the water, each according to its kind, and every winged bird according to its kind. And he saw that it was good.
verses.tr: Kaya't nilikha niya ang malalaking nilalang sa dagat at ang bawat buhay na nilalang na gumagalaw at nag-uumapaw sa tubig, ayon sa kani-kanilang uri, at ang bawat ibong may pakpak ayon sa uri nito. At nakita niyang mabuti ito.

verses.en: Our Father blessed them and said, "Be fruitful and multiply and fill the water in the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth."
verses.tr: Pinagpala sila ng ating Ama at sinabi, "Magpalaanakin kayo at magpakarami at punuin ang tubig sa mga dagat, at dumami ang mga ibon sa lupa."

verses.en: And there was evening, and there was morning—the fifth day.
verses.tr: At nagkaroon ng gabi, at nagkaroon ng umaga—ang ikalimang araw.

verses.en: And our Father said, "Let the land produce living creatures according to their kinds: livestock, creatures that move along the ground, and wild animals, each according to its kind." And it was so.
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Maglabas ang lupa ng mga buhay na nilalang ayon sa kani-kanilang uri: mga hayop na inaalagaan, mga nilalang na gumagapang sa lupa, at mababangis na hayop, ayon sa kani-kanilang uri." At nangyari nga.

verses.en: He made the wild animals according to their kinds, the livestock according to their kinds, and all the creatures that move along the ground according to their kinds. And he saw that it was good.
verses.tr: Ginawa niya ang mababangis na hayop ayon sa kanilang uri, ang mga hayop na inaalagaan ayon sa kanilang uri, at lahat ng nilalang na gumagapang sa lupa ayon sa kanilang uri. At nakita niyang mabuti ito.

verses.en: Then our Father said, "Let us make humanity in our image, in our likeness, so that they may rule over the fish in the sea and the birds in the sky, over the livestock, over all the earth, and over every creature that moves along the ground."
verses.tr: At sinabi ng ating Ama, "Lumikha tayo ng sangkatauhan ayon sa ating larawan, ayon sa ating wangis, upang mamahala sila sa mga isda sa dagat at sa mga ibon sa himpapawid, sa mga hayop na inaalagaan, sa buong lupa, at sa bawat nilalang na gumagapang sa lupa."

verses.en: So our Father created humanity in their own image; in the image of the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit he created them; male and female he created them.
verses.tr: Kaya't nilikha ng ating Ama ang sangkatauhan ayon sa kanilang sariling larawan; ayon sa larawan ng Ama, Anak, at Banal na Espiritu sila nilikha; lalaki at babae sila nilikha.

verses.en: Our Father blessed them and said to them, "Be fruitful and multiply; fill the earth and subdue it. Rule over the fish in the sea and the birds in the sky, and over every living creature that moves on the ground."
verses.tr: Pinagpala sila ng ating Ama at sinabi sa kanila, "Magpalaanakin kayo at magpakarami; punuin ang lupa at supilin ito. Mamahala kayo sa mga isda sa dagat at sa mga ibon sa himpapawid, at sa bawat buhay na nilalang na gumagalaw sa lupa."

verses.en: Then he said, "I give you every seed-bearing plant on the face of the whole earth and every tree that bears seed-bearing fruit. They will be yours for food.
verses.tr: At sinabi niya, "Ibinibigay ko sa inyo ang bawat pananim na may binhi sa balat ng buong lupa at ang bawat punongkahoy na namumunga ng bungang may binhi. Magiging pagkain ninyo ang mga ito.

verses.en: "And to all the animals of the earth, all the birds in the sky, and all the creatures that move along the ground—everything that has the breath of life in it—I give every green plant for food." And it was so.
verses.tr: "At sa lahat ng hayop sa lupa, sa lahat ng ibon sa himpapawid, at sa lahat ng nilalang na gumagapang sa lupa—sa bawat may hininga ng buhay sa kanya—ibinibigay ko ang bawat luntiang halaman bilang pagkain." At nangyari nga.

verses.en: Our Father saw all that he had made, and it was very good. So there was evening, and there was morning—the sixth day.
verses.tr: Nakita ng ating Ama ang lahat ng kanyang ginawa, at napakabuti nito. Kaya't nagkaroon ng gabi, at nagkaroon ng umaga—ang ikaanim na araw.

verses.en: Now there was a man of the Pharisees named Nicodemus, a ruler of the Jews.
verses.tr: May isang lalaki na kabilang sa mga Pariseo na nagngangalang Nicodemo, isang pinuno ng mga Judio.

verses.en: This man came to Jesus by night and said to him, "Rabbi, we know that you are a teacher who has come from our Father, for no one can do these signs that you do unless our Father is with him."
verses.tr: Lumapit ang lalaking ito kay Jesus nang gabi at sinabi sa kanya, "Rabi, alam namin na ikaw ay isang gurong nagmula sa ating Ama, sapagkat walang makagagawa ng mga tandang ginagawa mo malibang kasama niya ang ating Ama."

verses.en: Jesus replied to him, "Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born again he cannot see the kingdom of our Father."
verses.tr: Tumugon si Jesus sa kanya, "Katotohanan, katotohanang sinasabi ko sa iyo, malibang ang isang tao ay ipanganak na muli, hindi niya makikita ang kaharian ng ating Ama."

verses.en: Nicodemus said to him, "How can a man be born when he is old? Can he enter a second time into his mother's womb and be born?"
verses.tr: Sinabi sa kanya ni Nicodemo, "Paanong maipanganganak ang isang tao kung siya'y matanda na? Makapapasok ba siyang muli sa sinapupunan ng kanyang ina at maipanganganak?"

verses.en: Jesus answered, "Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born of water and the Holy Spirit, he cannot enter the kingdom of our Father."
verses.tr: Sumagot si Jesus, "Katotohanan, katotohanang sinasabi ko sa iyo, malibang ang isang tao ay ipanganak sa tubig at sa Banal na Espiritu, hindi siya makapapasok sa kaharian ng ating Ama."

verses.en: What is born of the flesh is flesh, and what is born of the Holy Spirit is spirit.
verses.tr: Ang ipinanganak sa laman ay laman, at ang ipinanganak sa Banal na Espiritu ay espiritu.

verses.en: Don't be amazed that I said to you, 'You must be born again.'
verses.tr: Huwag kayong magtaka na sinabi ko sa iyo, 'Kailangan kayong ipanganak na muli.'

verses.en: The wind blows where it wishes, and you hear its sound, but you do not know where it comes from or where it goes. So it is with everyone who is born of the Holy Spirit.
verses.tr: Umiihip ang hangin kung saan nito naisin, at naririnig mo ang ugong nito, ngunit hindi mo alam kung saan ito nanggagaling o kung saan ito patungo. Gayon din ang bawat ipinanganak sa Banal na Espiritu.

verses.en: Nicodemus said to him, "How can these things be?"
verses.tr: Sinabi sa kanya ni Nicodemo, "Paano nga mangyayari ang mga bagay na ito?"

verses.en: Jesus answered him, "Are you the teacher of Israel and yet you do not understand these things?"
verses.tr: Sumagot si Jesus sa kanya, "Ikaw ba ang guro ng Israel at hindi mo nauunawaan ang mga bagay na ito?"

verses.en: Truly, truly, I say to you, we speak of what we know, and bear witness to what we have seen, but you do not receive our testimony.
verses.tr: Katotohanan, katotohanang sinasabi ko sa iyo, sinasabi namin ang aming nalalaman, at pinatototohanan namin ang aming nakita, ngunit hindi ninyo tinatanggap ang aming patotoo.

verses.en: If I have told you earthly things and you do not believe, how can you believe if I tell you heavenly things?
verses.tr: Kung sinabi ko sa inyo ang mga bagay sa lupa at hindi kayo naniniwala, paano kayo maniniwala kung sabihin ko sa inyo ang mga bagay sa langit?

verses.en: No one has ascended into heaven except the one who descended from heaven, the Son of Man.
verses.tr: Walang umakyat sa langit kundi ang nanggaling sa langit, ang Anak ng Tao.

verses.en: And as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up,
verses.tr: At kung paanong itinaas ni Moises ang ahas sa ilang, gayon din kinakailangang itaas ang Anak ng Tao,

verses.en: that whoever believes in him may have eternal life.
verses.tr: upang ang sinumang sumampalataya sa kanya ay magkaroon ng buhay na walang hanggan.

verses.en: For our Father so loved the world, that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life.
verses.tr: Sapagkat gayon na lamang ang pag-ibig ng ating Ama sa sanlibutan, kaya't ibinigay niya ang kanyang kaisa-isang Anak, upang ang sinumang sumampalataya sa kanya ay hindi mapahamak kundi magkaroon ng buhay na walang hanggan.

verses.en: For our Father did not send his Son into the world to condemn the world, but so that the world might be saved through him.
verses.tr: Sapagkat isinugo ng ating Ama ang kanyang Anak sa sanlibutan, hindi upang hatulan ang sanlibutan, kundi upang maligtas ang sanlibutan sa pamamagitan niya.

verses.en: Whoever believes in him is not condemned, but whoever does not believe is condemned already, because he has not believed in the name of the one and only Son of our Father.
verses.tr: Ang sumampalataya sa kanya ay hindi hinahatulan, ngunit ang hindi sumampalataya ay hinatulan na, sapagkat hindi siya sumampalataya sa pangalan ng kaisa-isang Anak ng ating Ama.

verses.en: And this is the judgment: the light has come into the world, and people loved the darkness rather than the light because their works were evil.
verses.tr: At ito ang paghatol: dumating ang liwanag sa sanlibutan, at minahal ng mga tao ang dilim kaysa sa liwanag sapagkat masama ang kanilang mga gawa.

verses.en: For everyone who does wicked things hates the light and does not come to the light, for fear that his works will be exposed.
verses.tr: Sapagkat ang bawat gumagawa ng masama ay namumuhi sa liwanag at hindi lumalapit sa liwanag, dahil sa takot na malantad ang kanyang mga gawa.

verses.en: But whoever does what is true comes to the light, so that it may be clearly seen that his works have been carried out in our Father.
verses.tr: Ngunit ang gumagawa ng katotohanan ay lumalapit sa liwanag, upang maliwanag na makita na ang kanyang mga gawa ay isinagawa sa ating Ama.

verses.en: After this, Jesus and his disciples went into the Judean countryside, and there he remained with them and was baptizing.
verses.tr: Pagkatapos nito, pumunta si Jesus at ang kanyang mga alagad sa lalawigan ng Judea, at doon siya nanatiling kasama nila at nagbabautismo.

verses.en: John also was baptizing at Aenon near Salim, because water was plentiful there, and people were coming and being baptized,
verses.tr: Si Juan naman ay nagbabautismo sa Enon malapit sa Salim, sapagkat sagana roon ang tubig, at ang mga tao ay lumalapit at nabábautismuhan,

verses.en: for John had not yet been put in prison.
verses.tr: sapagkat hindi pa naibibilanggo si Juan noon.

verses.en: Now a discussion arose between some of John's disciples and a Jew over purification.
verses.tr: May nagkaroong pagtatalo ang ilan sa mga alagad ni Juan at isang Judio tungkol sa paglilinis.

verses.en: And they came to John and said to him, "Rabbi, he who was with you across the Jordan, to whom you bore witness—look, he is baptizing, and all are going to him."
verses.tr: At lumapit sila kay Juan at sinabi sa kanya, "Rabi, ang kasama mo sa kabila ng Jordan, na siyang pinatotohanan mo—tingnan mo, siya'y nagbabautismo, at ang lahat ay lumalapit sa kanya."

verses.en: John replied, "A person cannot receive even one thing unless it is given him from heaven."
verses.tr: Tumugon si Juan, "Walang taong makatatanggap ng anuman malibang ito'y ibigay sa kanya mula sa langit."

verses.en: You yourselves can testify that I said, 'I am not the Christ, but I have been sent before him.'
verses.tr: Kayo na mismo ang makapagpapatotoo na sinabi ko, 'Hindi ako ang Cristo, kundi isinugo ako bago siya.'

verses.en: The one who has the bride is the bridegroom — Jesus. The friend of the bridegroom, who stands and hears him, rejoices greatly at the bridegroom's voice. Therefore this joy of mine is now complete.
verses.tr: Ang may taglay ng kasintahang babae ay ang lalaking ikakasal—si Jesus. Ang kaibigan ng lalaking ikakasal, na nakatayo at nakikinig sa kanya, ay labis na nagagalak sa tinig ng lalaking ikakasal. Kaya't ganap na ngayon ang kagalakan kong ito.

verses.en: He must increase, but I must decrease.
verses.tr: Kinakailangang siya'y lumago, ngunit ako'y kumupas.

verses.en: The one who comes from above is above all. The one who is of the earth belongs to the earth and speaks in an earthly way. The one who comes from heaven is above all.
verses.tr: Ang nanggagaling sa itaas ay higit sa lahat. Ang nagmula sa lupa ay nauukol sa lupa at nagsasalita ng nauukol sa lupa. Ang nanggagaling sa langit ay higit sa lahat.

verses.en: He bears witness to what he has seen and heard, yet no one receives his testimony.
verses.tr: Pinatototohanan niya ang kanyang nakita at narinig, gayunma'y walang tumatanggap ng kanyang patotoo.

verses.en: Whoever receives his testimony confirms that our Father is true.
verses.tr: Ang tumatanggap ng kanyang patotoo ay nagpapatunay na ang ating Ama ay totoo.

verses.en: For the one whom our Father has sent speaks the words of our Father, for he gives the Holy Spirit without measure.
verses.tr: Sapagkat ang isinugo ng ating Ama ay nagsasalita ng mga salita ng ating Ama, sapagkat ibinibigay niya ang Banal na Espiritu nang walang sukat.

verses.en: Our Father loves the Son and has given all things into his hand.
verses.tr: Minamahal ng ating Ama ang Anak at ibinigay ang lahat ng bagay sa kanyang kamay.

verses.en: Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever does not obey the Son shall not see life, but the wrath of our Father remains on him.
verses.tr: Ang sumampalataya sa Anak ay may buhay na walang hanggan; ang hindi sumusunod sa Anak ay hindi makakakita ng buhay, kundi nananatili sa kanya ang poot ng ating Ama.
